name: Jira
description: Atlassian's issue tracking and agile project management tool for software teams, supporting Scrum and Kanban workflows.

years.notes: Jira Software era mark: three overlapping arrowheads with the Atlassian blue gradient, introduced when Jira was split into Software / Service Desk / Core.
2023 rebrand: the 'Software' suffix is dropped and the mark becomes three stacked rounded squares — part of Atlassian's unified product iconography.
